ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时，你可以选择一个爪牙角色：如果该角色不在场，你获得该角色的能力；反之，你醉酒。
firstNightReminder: Ask the Conjuror if they'd like to choose a minion character. If yes, place the "No Ability" token on the Conjuror. If not in-play, place the "is Conjuror" token on the Conjuror and immediately replace their character with the chosen minion. Otherwise, place the "Drunk" token on the Conjuror. Wake them exactly as if they were the chosen minion.
otherNightReminder: Ask the Conjuror if they'd like to choose a minion character. If yes, place the "No Ability" token on the Conjuror. If not in-play, place the "is Conjuror" token on the Conjuror and immediately replace their character with the chosen minion. Otherwise, place the "Drunk" token on the Conjuror. Wake them exactly as if they were the chosen minion.
